summary: Complete testing of Manual and Produtividade features for SYNAPSE. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly. 10/10 pytest tests passed. Both pages accessible from sidebar navigation.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - existing known issue, non-blocking. This is a recharts library issue when container dimensions are not yet available.

critical_code_review_comments: Manual page has all required components: search, 3 tabs (Módulos, Perfis, FAQ), 10 module cards, 3 profile cards, 6 FAQ items, support contacts
Produtividade page has all required KPIs: Pedidos, Aprovados, Reembolsos, Auditorias, Média/Dia, Membros Ativos
Period filter works correctly (7d, 15d, 30d, 90d, all) - data updates dynamically
Both pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Sidebar shows Produtividade link for admin/assistente and Manual link for all roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual (/manual) and Produtividade (/produtividade) pages fully tested. Both pages accessible from sidebar. Produtividade restricted to admin/assistente roles, Manual available to all roles. API returns data with membros sorted by total_acoes descending.

manual_page_load.notes: Page loads with header 'Manual do Sistema', search bar, 3 tabs

manual_modulos_tab.notes: Shows 10 expandable module cards with descriptions, features, and tips

manual_perfis_tab.notes: Shows 3 profile cards (Admin, Assistente, Consultor) with access permissions

manual_faq_tab.notes: Shows 6 FAQ items with questions and answers

produtividade_page_load.notes: Page loads with title, KPI cards, charts, and member table

produtividade_kpis.notes: 6 KPI cards: Pedidos(413), Aprovados(396), Reembolsos(50), Auditorias(3), Média/Dia(13.8), Membros Ativos(2)

produtividade_ranking_chart.notes: Bar chart showing team member activity ranking

produtividade_evolution_chart.notes: Line chart showing daily evolution of pedidos and acoes

produtividade_members_table.notes: Table with columns: #, Membro, Perfil, Pedidos Criados, Alt. Status, Auditorias, Reembolsos, Total Ações

produtividade_period_filter.notes: Dropdown with 7d, 15d, 30d, 90d, all options - data updates correctly

sidebar_produtividade_link.notes: Link present in sidebar for admin users

sidebar_manual_link.notes: Link present in sidebar for all authenticated users

api_produtividade_dashboard.notes: Returns valid JSON with kpis, membros (sorted), evolucao_diaria

api_period_filters.notes: All period filters (7d, 15d, 30d, 90d, all) return correct data
